text: Refunds are processed within 3-5 business days once the return is approved.
You can track an order from the dashboard under Order History using its tracking number.
Live chat support is available 24/7 from the Help menu in the app.
Standard shipping takes 3-5 business days; express shipping takes 1-2 business days.
Reset your password using the Forgot Password link on the login page.
We accept Visa, Mastercard, American Express, PayPal, and Apple Pay.
Orders can be cancelled within 1 hour of placement, before they are dispatched.
International shipping is available to most countries; rates and delivery times vary by destination.
Gift wrapping with a personalized message is available at checkout for a small fee.
We price-match identical items from authorized retailers within 14 days of purchase.
